Environment details for H1-api-pull-ssrf PoC execution
=======================================================
Date: 2026-04-17
Platform: darwin (macOS arm64)
Go version: go1.26.1 darwin/arm64
Repository: github.com/ollama/ollama
Branch: audit (main branch: main)
Commit: 57653b8e42d69ec35f68a59857bad4d0f07994a3
Commit message: cmd/launch: show WSL guidance on Windows instead of handing off (#15637)

Test method: in-process Go integration test
  - Exercises pullModelManifest() directly (the function called by PullHandler goroutine)
  - Uses httptest.NewServer() to simulate internal HTTP target
  - No external network dependencies
  - Demonstrates exploit through real production code paths
